title: Product Routing + Resource Recommendation
description: Maps exposure types to BSA/TSA resources and at most one paid pathway. Prices appear only when MONETIZATION_MAP.md records an established price; otherwise the CTA is non-numeric.

guard.description: A precondition that must hold or the rule is skipped, e.g. 'family_complexity_indicated'. Prevents routing to a family kit when no family complexity was reported.

price_usd.description: Only set when MONETIZATION_MAP.md records an established price. Null means show a non-numeric CTA.

price_source.description: Repo path + line proving the price, per MONETIZATION_MAP.md rules.

cta_style.description: 'priced' only when price_usd is set and proven.

rationale.description: Why this pathway fits, in non-salesy language framed as 'this may help if…'.
